mapper.select: SELECT order_id, user_id, station_id, start_time, end_time, duration_minutes, total_amount, payment_status, order_status, created_time FROM orders WHERE order_status = #{orderStatus} ORDER BY created_time DESC

SELECT order_id, user_id, station_id, start_time, end_time, duration_minutes, total_amount, payment_status, order_status, created_time FROM orders WHERE payment_status = #{paymentStatus} ORDER BY created_time DESC
SELECT order_id, user_id, station_id, start_time, end_time, duration_minutes, total_amount, payment_status, order_status, created_time FROM orders WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_time DESC

SELECT order_id, user_id, station_id, start_time, end_time, duration_minutes, total_amount, payment_status, order_status, created_time FROM orders WHERE station_id = #{stationId} ORDER BY created_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(order_id) AS orderCount, IFNULL(SUM(total_amount), 0.00) AS totalAmount FROM orders WHERE created_time BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime}
SELECT order_id, user_id, station_id, start_time, end_time, duration_minutes, total_amount, payment_status, order_status, created_time FROM orders WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_time DESC
